title: Masayoshi Son
html:
Masayoshi Son

SoftBank founder, Vision Fund architect, the canonical mentor-from-afar in Yahir's vault. The first person Yahir ever wrote a 12-line "operating principles" extraction note about (2022 02 28 masayoshi son) — and the source-of-truth for the 10x thinking frame that recurs across his ambition language for years.

What Yahir extracted

From 2022 02 28 masayoshi son (the Feb 2022 distillation):

  • Vision Fund thesis
  • "AI certified future / Metaverse certified future" — the future-bet articulation
  • "Think bigger, 10x bigger" → 10x thinking
  • "You become like those you surround yourself with" — peer-selection rule
  • The boss-filter heuristic: "would I be alright working for that person?"
  • "You can dream a thousand things, you only have to act on one"

This isn't a celebrity admiration note — it's an operating-system rip: Yahir treats Son as a source code drop and immediately ports the principles into his own decision-making language.

Chronology

  • 2019-06-26 — 2019 06 26 goal and time frame — first vault mention (HS-era)
  • 2022-02-28 — 2022 02 28 masayoshi son — the canonical distillation note (this is the file)
  • 2022-02-28 — 2022 02 28 masayoshi son watch — sister note, more raw
  • 2022-05-27 — 2022 05 27 Companies to Learn from... and beyond — SoftBank in the companies-to-study lineup
  • 2022-11-28 — 2022 11 28 riley looks like a character from a duluth trading commercia — Son referenced in a Riley aside
  • 2023-03-24 — 2023 03 24 thoughts on ai emergence — Son's AI-future framing reused
  • 2024-04-09 — 2024 04 09 jensen questions — Son referenced alongside Jensen Huang as figures to study
  • 2025-06-04 — 2025 06 04 screenshot 2025 06 04 at 3 31 34 pm 43a2d025 — most recent appearance

Why it matters in the graph

Son is the prototype for the mentors-from-afar practice that later expands to Lex Fridman / Sam Altman (2023 03 29 plans for spring break), Marcus Aurelius (meditations), Dale Carnegie (2023 08 29 thoughts and principle from dale carnegie), Jensen Huang. The Son note invents the format: read/listen → distill into 10-12 operating principles → port directly into action language.

Connections

10x thinking · vision fund · the austin thesis · outpace · ambition · lineage as fate · debt of gratitude
